markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between GrowthX and Pylon for content creation and SEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has narrowed its focus to editorial content creation and programmatic SEO, not offering full-stack content services as previously advertised](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Pylon is evaluating long-term content strategy options, considering GrowthX vs. hiring in-house](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Misalignment on service scope (e.g., social media distribution) requires Pylon to reassess their needs](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [GrowthX pricing remains $12-15K/month for editorial, with potential add-ons at $9-15K/month](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Service Offering Clarification

  - [Now focused primarily on editorial content creation and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [No longer offering social media management, content distribution, or repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Can provide strategy guidance on backlinking, GEO influence via Reddit/social](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Pricing: $12-15K/month for editorial, additional $9-15K/month for custom work](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### Pylon's Content Strategy

  - [Recently engaged a freelancer for initial "war chest" of content (2 pillar pieces, derivatives)](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Seeking long-term strategy post-freelancer engagement](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Content is a critical pillar in Pylon's broader marketing strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
  - [Raised Series A; budget for content partnership not a concern](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Deliverables

  - [Create, stage, and publish blog content in client's CMS](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Develop SEO and GEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Generate specialized, technical content as needed](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Focus on building domain authority and audience-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO examples: city-specific pages (Ramp), vendor pages based on spend data](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

### Measuring Content Success

  - [KPIs: keywords, organic traffic, eventual MQL conversion](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [GrowthX uses Google Search Console, Looker dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Metrics: articles published, impressions, clicks, rankings, AI search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Track engagement and conversion (signups, sales conversations)](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)

### Potential Partnership Considerations

  - [Long-term view on content strategy (potentially years)](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [GrowthX could replace need for in-house content person](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
  - [Pylon needs to evaluate if partial content services meet their needs](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [Decision between full-stack outsourced solution vs. partial service](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Pylon to internally reassess content needs and desired service scope](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Pylon to consider build vs. buy approach for AI-driven content creation](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [GrowthX to address website copy discrepancies with internal team](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Potential re-engagement if Pylon determines GrowthX's focused offering aligns with their needs](https://fathom.video/share/zZAbaS5-v2A7MJ9SHpxYexK8NzPBGzqb?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
